title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Honeywell India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Honeywell India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Honeywell India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Honeywell India:
Honeywell India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honeywell India!
